name: Salesforce PRO
shortDescription: Comprehensive Salesforce CRM integration with advanced features for complex sales operations, lead conversion, and enterprise-level automation workflows.

actions.name: Add Contact to Campaign
actions.description: Adds an existing contact to an existing campaign.

actions.name: Add File to Record
actions.description: Adds an existing file to an existing record.

actions.name: Add Lead to Campaign
actions.description: Adds an existing lead to an existing campaign.

actions.name: Convert Lead to Contact
actions.description: Converts an existing lead to a contact.

actions.name: Create Attachment
actions.description: Creates a new attachment (max 25MB).

actions.name: Create Child Records (with line item support)
actions.description: Creates records from line items and sets the parent-child relationship.

actions.name: Create Contact
actions.description: Creates a new contact in Salesforce.

actions.name: Create Enhanced Note
actions.description: Creates a new enhanced note with optional record attachment.

actions.name: Create File
actions.description: Creates a new file (max 25MB).

actions.name: Create Lead
actions.description: Creates a new lead in Salesforce.

actions.name: Create Note
actions.description: Creates a new note and links it to a parent record.

actions.name: Create Record
actions.description: Creates a new record of a specified Salesforce object (e.g., Contact, Lead, Opportunity).

actions.name: Create Record (UTC)
actions.description: Creates a new record of a specified Salesforce object (e.g., Contact, Lead, Opportunity). Date inputs will be treated as if they are in UTC.

actions.name: Delete Record
actions.description: Deletes an existing record of a specified Salesforce object.

actions.name: Send Email
actions.description: Sends an email using Salesforce Simple Email Actions.

actions.name: Update Contact
actions.description: Updates an existing contact in Salesforce.

actions.name: Update Lead
actions.description: Updates an existing lead in Salesforce.

actions.name: Update Record
actions.description: Updates an existing record for a specified Salesforce object.

actions.name: Update Record (UTC)
actions.description: Updates an existing record for a specified Salesforce object. Date inputs will be treated as if they are in UTC.

actions.name: Find Child Records
actions.description: Finds child records for a given Parent ID and returns the child records as line items.

actions.name: Find Record
actions.description: Finds a record of a specified Salesforce object by up to two fields and values you choose. Optionally, creates a record if none is found.

actions.name: Find Record by Query
actions.description: Finds a record of a Salesforce object using a Salesforce Object Query (SOQL) WHERE clause. Optionally, creates a record if none is found.

actions.name: Find Records
actions.description: Finds records of a specified Salesforce object by a field and a value you choose.

actions.name: Find Records by Query
actions.description: Finds one or more records of a Salesforce object using a Salesforce Object Query (SOQL) WHERE clause.

actions.name: Get Record Attachments
actions.description: Gets all notes and attachments for a record.

idealUseCases: Advanced lead management and conversion workflows
Complex sales opportunity tracking and reporting
Multi-record relationship management and line items
Custom SOQL query execution and data analysis
Comprehensive contact and lead lifecycle management
